summary: On the Konstantinovsky direction in Nikolaypole, Ukrainian forces lost a T-80U tank to a combined artillery and FPV drone strike. Russian forces in the Pokrovsk area destroyed enemy drones, vehicles, and electronic warfare systems, while Ukrainian units reported using fiber-optic FPV drones with up to 50 km range to strike deep into Russian rear areas. Ukrainian forces are also deploying new systems like the SHADOX UAV and adapting control frequencies to evade jamming, while Russian troops face mounting losses from drone attacks on artillery and logistics. Meanwhile, both sides are testing advanced technologies, including AI autopilots and humanoid robots, as drone warfare continues to reshape battlefield tactics.
